ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "fingerprint_key" TEXT /* Fingerprint key for the model */,
  "output_fingerprint_key" TEXT /* Output fingerprint key for the model */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last used */,
  "rasa_version" TEXT /* Version of the Rasa framework used to train the model */,
  "result_location" TEXT /* Location of the model result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the model result */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of NLP model (e.g., sentiment analysis, text classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses this architecture */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the architecture was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the architecture */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the architecture was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model trained on this dataset */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data was added */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the data */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses this hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hyperparameter was set */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who set the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hyperparameter was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who recorded the metric */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for model access */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the API key */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the API key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of deployment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Deployment environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the deployment */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deployment (e.g., active, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment that this log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES model_deployments ("deployment_id")
)
